category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/tuxera/ntfs-3g describes NTFS-3G as a safe read/write NTFS driver.
source_facts.description says Read-write NTFS driver for FUSE.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/tuxera/ntfs-3g and wiki https://github.com/tuxera/ntfs-3g/wiki use NTFS-3G.
docs_sources: Official repository README points users to https://github.com/tuxera/ntfs-3g/wiki for news, support, and information.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/tuxera/ntfs-3g is linked by the official wiki and identifies the project as NTFS-3G.
tags_sources: Official wiki https://github.com/tuxera/ntfs-3g/wiki describes read/write NTFS support across operating systems.
source_facts.description identifies an NTFS FUSE driver.
